summary: Backend API testing complete for Squash Coach. All 30 tests passed covering auth (register, login, forgot-password, reset-password, logout, delete account), player management with new fields (category, gender, country, city, club, is_mine), sync flow, and match detail endpoints.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing SKIPPED - This is a React Native/Expo mobile app, not testable via Playwright browser automation

critical_code_review_comments: Email sending is MOCKED (SMTP_PASSWORD not configured) - forgot-password and welcome emails won't be delivered in test environment
Review account 'googleplayreview@squashcoach.app' returned 401 on login - likely registered via Google OAuth rather than email/password

success_rate.frontend: N/A - React Native app, not browser testable

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix using unique UUIDs for each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend API endpoints working correctly. Test file uses unique emails with UUID to avoid conflicts. Email functionality is MOCKED. This is a React Native/Expo app - frontend cannot be tested via Playwright.

endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/register: PASS - Creates user and returns session token
endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/reset-password: PASS - Resets password with code validation
endpoints_tested.POST /api/players: PASS - Creates player with all new fields (category, gender, country, city, club, is_mine)
endpoints_tested.GET /api/players: PASS - Returns all players for user with new fields
endpoints_tested.POST /api/sync: PASS - Syncs data with new player fields
endpoints_tested.GET /api/matches/{match_id}: PASS - Returns match with points and game results
endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/auth/account: PASS - Deletes user account and all data
endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/logout: PASS - Logs out user and invalidates session
